text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While at summer camp, Tamamo Cross tells me
about a recent incident involving her younger
brother. Apparently, he got into a fight with a
neighborhood kid who argued that Oguri Cap was
faster than Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, Oguri Cap's running has mesmerized the
public. Curious to know the secret to her charm,
Tamamo Cross decides to press Oguri Cap herself
for an answer this summer.
